intro.quote: The will to win is nothing without the will to prepare

roadToAutonomous.title: Road to Autonomous
roadToAutonomous.subtitle: Our simulation-first approach ensures every algorithm is battle-tested before deployment.

0.title: Skynet Core
0.description: Our multiprocessing brain processes perception and planning in a virtualized E2E environment before hardware validation.

1.title: Brain-Spine Sync
1.description: Our custom Serial Protocol ensures the logic (Python) and the reflexes (C++) on the RP2040 are perfectly synchronized.

2.title: RAVEN Deployment
2.description: Our simulation-hardened stack is deployed onto the custom 3D-printed chassis, achieving full autonomous parity on day one.

technicalGrid.title: Eyes, Spine, Brain
technicalGrid.subtitle: Our workforce operates like a precision F1 pit crew — each module specialized, all synchronized.

perception.name: Perception
perception.subtitle: The Eyes
perception.responsibility: Lane detection, Sign recognition, and IPM mapping.

embedded.name: Embedded
embedded.subtitle: The Spine
embedded.responsibility: PID Control, Motor PWM, and Serial Parsing.

integration.name: Integration
integration.subtitle: The Brain
integration.responsibility: Finite State Machines and UI Telemetry.

timeline.title: The 3-Month Journey
timeline.footer: Never give up. The car is coming.
timeline.footerDesc: A 1/10 scale educational prototype — initially flagged for additional customs classification, then transitioned to a specialized regulatory review under institutional tech frameworks. What followed was 63 days of persistent engagement, detailed technical submissions, and leveraging our university and industry network. From the GUC President to senior faculty to direct collaboration with the NTRA (National Telecommunications Regulatory Authority) — we navigated every official channel to bridge the gap between innovation and regulation.
timeline.footerBadge: Proud to be the only African team — also representing the Arab world and Middle East.

0.description: 15 detailed questions sent to BFMC team about hardware, funding, travel, and tech stack

1.description: All questions answered — green light to apply

2.description: Team RAVEN presents to Bosch jury

3.description: Selected as 1 of 78 teams (from 163 applicants) — only team from Africa

4.description: Official competition start — car shipped from Romania

5.description: Shipment held — misclassified as "vehicle spare parts"

6.description: Team explains it's a 1/10-scale educational prototype

7.description: Team visits Cairo Cargo Village with passports, supervisor letters, and IDs

8.description: Bill of Materials and Bosch documentation sent to NTRA

9.description: Technical discussion on Raspberry Pi integration (while fighting customs)

10.description: Notification that shipment was "cleared" — celebration was premature

11.description: Shipment flagged for specialized classification — requires additional institutional verification for remote-controlled prototypes

12.description: Team negotiates with DHL to hold shipment while pursuing independent appeal

13.description: Technical discussion on Nucleo integration (still no car)

14.description: Team leverages university and industry contacts to reach NTRA decision-makers directly - leaving no stone unturned, andabing DHL channels

15.description: DHL warns shipment may be returned if not resolved soon

16.description: GUC President and senior faculty provide official letters vouching for educational purpose

17.description: NTRA POC out of office — soft copy lost in system

18.description: Egypt implements new blockchain import system — adds complexity

19.description: Team submits all documents directly to NTRA in person

20.description: Decision rectified — clearance finally approved after 63 days

21.description: Legal documents returned to DHL Service Point

22.description: DHL confirms ready — standing by for delivery

23.description: DHL confirmed status: Awaiting final security clearance from NSD

24.description: Notified that CNSD certificate and manual inspection at Abbasiya HQ are required for approval.

25.description: Team negotiates with DHL and Bosch to handle specialized customs fees and shipment renewal.

26.description: Bosch CFO provides direct authorization for customs issues, as requested by regulatory authorities.

27.description: Team decides to build a custom car from scratch after 80 days of delay to ensure competition readiness.

28.description: Team RAVEN officially notifies Bosch of the custom build using locally sourced, BoM-compliant components.

29.description: Bosch approves the custom build: 'The car looks great. Best of luck!'

30.description: Hatem officially instructs DHL to return the held shipment to Bosch in Romania.

31.description: The locally built chassis is assembled and powered for the first time.

32.description: Custom car achieves stable wireless control and manual mapping capabilities.

33.description: Team requests Bosch to open an RT account for the shipment to be returned safely.

34.description: DHL confirms the original shipment is ready for re-export with a new AWB.

35.description: Arena prepared with interlocking foam tiles and masking tape for final E2E testing.

36.description: Stanley Control and map-based localization finalized; Skynet architecture achieves pure E2E performance for qualification.

ourJourney.title: Our Journey
ourJourney.subtitle: Behind The Scenes
ourJourney.description: The road to BFMC 2026 wasn't just code — it was customs documents, airport runs, and unwavering belief. We started documenting our journey months before even registering, because we knew we'd be part of this future, regardless of the odds.
ourJourney.note: * English captions for videos will be available soon.
ourJourney.story: When our car shipment faced unexpected regulatory delays during classification, we chose to double down on our Simulation-First strategy. The dates below prove it — we were building our codebase and documentation long before the hardware arrived. While navigating these complex procedures, our digital twin kept evolving. These hurdles didn't slow us down; they sharpened our technical resolve.

0.caption: Parked and ready — sushi time, arrived right on time
